title: I am a fucking killer — fire-behind-eyes manifesto (2026)
html:
I am a fucking killer — fire-behind-eyes manifesto (2026)

Source: 2026-01-22 Apple Note (titled "1/21/2026"). Single-paragraph manifesto in the killer-mode register.

TL;DR

  • "I am a fucking killer. Intense fire is behind my eyes and I will devour. The only way to crack me is to kill me. Death is not feared, life is engulfed."
  • Genre: pure manifesto style note — third paragraph in a one-paragraph note. Same energy as 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void and 2026 04 14 "Me".
  • 2026-Q1 mood pattern: Yahir at peak self-deification frequency. This is the darkest/most-aggressive register of the manifesto genre — counterweight to the gentler "I am abundance / I am love" notes.
  • "Death is not feared, life is engulfed" — best line; the inversion (we usually fear death and consume life; here it's life doing the consuming).
  • Sits inside the Rankett sales-ramp period; the manifesto fuel and the cold-call grind co-exist.

Connections

  • 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void with smile
  • 2026 04 14 i am gods eyes
  • 2023 10 23 cool saying villain quotes
  • walk with gods eyes
  • soul as beacon
  • austin tx
  • rankett
